no: Install after Shadow Magic. ToF rebalances Blade spins (levels 3/5); BW gives spin uses with levels. Casting in leather/studded leather works without penalty; other armor disables casting. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #12.

conflicts.reason: BW's Blade/Jester/Skald overhauls and bard mechanics overlap with M&G's Bard Overhaul.

modify: Complete Jester overhaul with Piercing Mockery song, Heckle, Mad Ramble abilities
Complete Skald overhaul with weapon specialization, Battle Song of Valor, Combat Casting

sum: Adds 17 bard-focused kits and abilities. Expands bard song options and creates new bard playstyles beyond the vanilla archetypes.

co.no: Blade Overhaul. Rebalances the Blade bard kit with revised spin abilities and combat options.

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Abettor of Mask Kit
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Abettor of Mask Kit
co.no: Abettor of Mask bard kit. Shadow-themed bard serving Mask with stealth and deception abilities.
Dancer bard kit. Performance-focused bard with movement-based combat abilities and evasion.
Darkbloom bard kit. Nature/shadow hybrid bard with plant-themed magic and dark melodies.
Storm Drummer bard kit. Thunder-themed bard whose percussion creates lightning and sonic damage.
Troubadour bard kit. Classic traveling minstrel with enhanced Bard Song and social abilities.
Deathsinger bard kit. Necromantic bard whose songs raise undead and drain life from enemies.
Strategist bard kit. Tactical commander bard who buffs allies with battle plans and combat formations.
Adds the Gallant Paladin kit. SKIPPED by WeiDU if EEex not installed — requires EEex_Actionbar.lua.

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Armored Casting for Bards
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Armored Casting for Bards

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Bard Song Mechanics Tweak
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Bard Song Mechanics Tweak
co.no: HARD FAIL with A7-GolemConstruction: uses DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH on ALL .bcs files — chokes on A7!GXRU.BCS (golem AI script) with PARSE ERROR at line 6. Also fails on BDAERIEC.BCS (SoD Aerie) in large installs. Same SFO lib_spl.tph issue as ToF/SCS. INSTALL FIX: Apply the lib_spl.tph PATCH_IF guard to BW's copy too (BardicWonders ships its own SFO). Without fix, do not use with A7-GolemConstruction. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #12.

co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Item Restriction Tweaks (bards may use mage items and priest scrolls)

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Bard Song Overhead Visual Effect
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Bard Song Overhead Visual Effect

co.no: Adds new bard HLAs. Install after other HLA-modifying mods.
Adds new spells for bards. Install after other spell mods.

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Mage/Bard and Fighter/Mage/Bard multi-class
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Mage/Bard and Fighter/Mage/Bard multi-class (EEex, under thief multis)
co.no: Adds Mage/Bard and Fighter/Mage/Bard multi-class options (listed under thief multis). SKIPPED by WeiDU if EEex not installed — requires EEex_Actionbar.lua.

co.n: Bardic Wonders: 3e Alignment for Bards (any non-lawful)
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: 3e Alignment for Bards (any non-lawful)
co.no: Allows bards of any non-lawful alignment (3e rules). Changes alignment restriction from chaotic-only.

co.n: Bardic Wonders: Patch Dialogue Class Checks for Gallant, Mage/Bard and Fighter/Mage/Bard
co.tp2n: Bardic Wonders: Patch Dialogue Class Checks for: Gallant, Mage/Bard and Fighter/Mage/Bard (install late)
co.no: Patches dialogue class checks for cn:1012 and cn:2009 kits. Install late. SKIPPED by WeiDU if neither cn:1012 nor cn:2009 is installed.
